settings.darkGraphiteHint: Soft charcoal. Layers read clearly, easiest on the eyes.
settings.darkWarmHint: A faint warm tint. Cozier, less clinical.

settings.legalIntro: This device and its software are provided as part of your service agreement with LifeInvader Wireless.
settings.legalRf: This equipment complies with San Andreas RF exposure limits for portable devices. FCC ID: SA-SP2024.
settings.legalTrademarks: All product names, logos and brands are property of their respective owners in the state of San Andreas.
settings.legalWarranty: Hardware is covered by a one-year limited warranty. Unauthorized modification of the operating system voids all warranty coverage.
settings.lowPowerFooter: Low Power Mode reduces background activity until your phone recharges.

settings.simBackupFooter: Cloud Backup belongs to your character, protected by a password kept in your Passwords app. Restoring on a new phone brings back your contacts, messages, photos and settings — never the phone number. A lost number is lost.

settings.simOtherPhonesFooter: These phones still receive their own calls and messages. Open one to act as its number.
settings.simRestoreDone: Backup restored. Reopen your apps to see the data.
